seed_problem: Assign drones to delivery zones under per-drone capacity to maximize served weight
mutation: composite: generalize input (per-satellite AND per-debris value/cost matrix, capacitated) and tighten objective (weighted generalized assignment) -> NP-hard maximization of hazard weight removed
title: Orbital Debris Cleanup Tasking
strategies: constructive greedy + local reassignment / swap search
LP/flow relaxation rounding of the generalized assignment
